name: recruitment-quiz-system
description: Local-first recruitment quiz and testing system for interviews

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && cd server && npx prisma migrate dev && npx prisma db seed
scripts.docker:db:migrate: docker-compose exec server npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.docker:db:seed: docker-compose exec server npx prisma db seed
scripts.docker:db:reset: docker-compose exec server npx prisma migrate reset --force

author: Internal Team
